summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new poster repository and favorites/watchlist/watched features. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly with excellent integration.

design_issues.issue: Poster repository information could be more prominently displayed

passed_tests: Poster repository directory exists at /app/backend/poster_repository
GET /api/settings returns cached_posters count and poster_repo_dir
GET /api/posters/{size}/{filename} serves cached poster files (404 for non-existent)
POST /api/movies/{id}/favorite toggles favorite status correctly
POST /api/movies/{id}/watchlist toggles watchlist status correctly
POST /api/movies/{id}/watched toggles watched status correctly
GET /api/stats returns favorites, watchlist, and watched counts
GET /api/movies with list filters (is_favorite, is_watchlist, watched) works
Frontend tabs: All Movies, Favorites, Watchlist, Watched, Unwatched all functional
Movie cards show heart/bookmark/eye icons for favorite/watchlist/watched status
Movie detail modal has working favorite/watchlist/watched toggle buttons
Stats badges in header show correct counts and filter when clicked
Tab filtering works correctly (shows filtered movies)
Search functionality works with movie titles
Directory and metadata filters are present and functional
Grid size controls (compact/normal) work correctly
Navigation between Library and Settings pages works
Settings page TMDB API key configuration functional
All existing API endpoints still functional
Movie overlay buttons work on hover
Modal opens and closes correctly
Backend API returns correct poster repository information

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor display issue with poster info, core functionality perfect)
